calendar.matters: ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status Hearing For Filing Of A Petition For Final Distribution Or A Petition For Approval Of Report On Status Of Administration

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status Hearing For Filing Of A Petition For Final Distribution Or A Petition For Approval Of Report On Status Of Administration
Off Calendar Apr-14-2026 Continued To Jul-14-26 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: No appearance was made by any Party, Counsel or Interested Person.

An Order to Appear and Order to Show Cause will be issued to Gloria K. Park (attorney) to appear on July 14, 2026 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204 to show cause as to why sanctions in the amount of $250.00 should not be imposed against her for failure to appear. Order to show cause to file a petition final distribution, or file waivers of the account from two other beneficiaries and file the two-year accounting from the date of death 2023 through 2025. Status on filing a petition for final distribution is also continued to that date.

Judge:Russell S. Roeca. Clerk: A. Datt. Deputy: Fajardo. Not reported
